purpose: Machine-loadable SQO execution model. Canonical source of truth for governance stage sequencing, state vocabulary, allowed transitions, and artifact requirements. Must be loaded after any context compaction before SQO work.

CANDIDATE.description: Initial state after derivation. Awaiting operator review.

ACCEPTED.description: Operator accepted the proposition as structurally valid.

REJECTED.description: Operator rejected the proposition as structurally invalid or ungrounded.

CONTESTED.description: Operator disputes the proposition. Requires arbitration.

ARBITRATED.description: Arbitration resolved a contested proposition. Final disposition.

stage_states.NOT_STARTED: Stage has not begun. Prerequisites may or may not be met.
stage_states.IN_PROGRESS: Stage execution underway. Artifacts partially produced.
stage_states.COMPLETE: Stage finished. All required artifacts produced and valid.
stage_states.BLOCKED: Stage cannot proceed. Missing prerequisites or governance hold.
stage_states.DEFERRED: Stage intentionally postponed. Not a failure — a governed decision.

promotion_states.S1: First governed advancement. Full gate traversal proven.
promotion_states.S2: Full qualification. Enrichment, convergence, and revalidation complete.

revalidation_verdicts.PARTIAL: Some checks failed. Gate 4 NOT cleared. Fix required.

anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_NOMINAL: Candidate corpus is dimensionally comparable to reference. No block.
anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_ELEVATED: Some dimensions failed but no CRITICAL failures. Operator override permitted.
anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_CRITICAL: CRITICAL dimensions failed. Advancement blocked. No override.

invalid_transitions.reason: Contested propositions resolve through arbitration only.
Contested propositions resolve through arbitration only.

gate_1_ceu_reconciliation.name: CEU Reconciliation
gate_1_ceu_reconciliation.description: Operator confirms, rejects, or merges CEU candidates. Establishes the structural partition that all downstream derivation operates on.

gate_2_proposition_derivation.name: Semantic Proposition Derivation
gate_2_proposition_derivation.description: Derives propositions from structural or evidence substrate. PATH A uses derivation_engine.py (code graph). PATH B uses proposition_bridge.py (SDC/CSR evidence).

gate_3_proposition_review.name: Proposition Review
gate_3_proposition_review.description: Operator reviews candidate propositions. Exercises governance friction: accept, reject, contest, arbitrate. Batch accept-unflagged for non-flagged propositions.
gate_3_proposition_review.completion_condition: proposition_review_state.json status == COMPLETE AND all dispositions terminal
gate_3_proposition_review.naming_rule: Individual actions produce past-participle form: accept→ACCEPTED, reject→REJECTED, contest→CONTESTED, arbitrate→ARBITRATED. Never ACCEPT or REJECT (present tense).

gate_4_revalidation.name: Deterministic Revalidation
gate_4_revalidation.description: 25-check deterministic revalidation across 8 phases. All checks must PASS for gate clearance.

gate_5_promotion.name: Promotion Evaluation
gate_5_promotion.description: Operator evaluates S-level advancement. Constitutional replay anchor runs automatically before advancement. Anchor can block if CRITICAL dimensions fail.
gate_5_promotion.completion_condition: promotion_state.json s_level advanced AND provenance == GOVERNED_LIFECYCLE

enrichment.name: Substrate Enrichment
enrichment.description: Strengthens weak/DERIVED propositions with additional evidence. PATH A: code graph authority edges. PATH B: HTML document structure re-extraction. Feeds back into Gate 4 for re-revalidation.
input_artifacts: evidence source files (codebase or HTML documents)
enrichment.note: Materializer not yet formalized. PATH A used code graph enrichment. PATH B enrichment TBD.

rehydration_contract.trigger: Context compaction, session resume, or continuation from prior conversation
verification: State vocabulary loaded — disposition names are canonical, not reconstructed
Current stage identified — which gate is the run at?
Allowed transitions known — what can happen next?
Artifact locations known — where are inputs and outputs?
rehydration_contract.hard_rule: No S-state advancement may be evaluated unless SQO_EXECUTION_GRAPH has been loaded and current run state is mapped onto it.
